chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 154 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.04.2026. Mr. Rajab Ali, Advocate for applicant along with applicant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State along with Inspector Muhammad Anwar Leghari SHO PS Shaheed Fazil Rahu. = The concerned SHO has produced the alleged detainee Mst. Lal Khatoon wife of Manzoor Ali who has submitted before this Court that she is residing with her parents by her own choice. It is clear that detenue is an adult. Additionally, the SHO has also produced a statement of alleged detainee which is also taken on record. Meanwhile, the advocate for private respondents Mr. Bilal Bagrani has placed on record a statement attaching certain documents which is also taken on record along with his Vakalatnama. As the detainee is an adult and remains at liberty to declare and decide wherever she wishes to reside, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application has served its purpose and is disposed of in the above terms. The concerned SHO is however directed to provide legal protection to the alleged detainee for safe journey of the detainee to the residence of her choice. JUDGE Tufail
